name: Pixel Depth Sort
description: Simulates 3D depth by displacing pixels based on brightness. Features HDR gold rim lighting, ACES tone mapping, atmospheric fog, and depth-aware parallax. Mouse controls viewing perspective.

params.name: Atmosphere
params.description: Atmospheric fog density and shadow strength

params.name: Quality
params.description: Number of depth layers to sample

params.name: Rim Intensity
params.description: Strength of gold rim lighting on silhouette edges
